_comment: Per-kind format index (AG-0011 / AG-0132). Authoritative answer to 'which formats does kind X ship, and which is the default?'. Read by the format-aware ${TEMPLATE} resolver (scripts/project.mjs) and the widened Q2 user-choice prompt (rules/user-choice-discipline.md). Index keys are KINDS; each format points at the kind's DEFAULT variant body. Sibling variants (e.g. markdown/plans/minimal.md, markdown/decisions/opencode.md, json/decisions/claude-code.json, the project/ family) are NOT separate index entries — they are resolved by skills directly, not through this index.

plans.description: Implementation/release plan skeleton — frontmatter header plus task shape.

specs.description: Feature spec skeleton — problem, constraints, acceptance.

decisions.description: Four-part decision record (D-NN) shape consumed by design-exploration, ADR, framework-selection, and implementation-planner.

tickets.description: Work-ticket skeleton — summary, acceptance criteria, dependencies.

code-review.description: Code-review writeup — severity-graded findings, coverage notes, reviewer sign-off. Markdown skeleton for inline review; HTML for a standalone stakeholder deliverable; JSON for machine-consumed findings.

implementation-plan.description: Implementation-plan deliverable — phased plan with status pill and validation evidence. HTML deliverable; markdown working doc; JSON task graph.

status-report.description: Status report — highlights, in-progress, blockers, metrics, next-up. HTML deliverable; markdown update; JSON metrics/tasks.

incident-report.description: Incident report — timeline, impact, root cause, follow-ups. HTML deliverable; markdown postmortem; JSON timeline/metrics.

pr-writeup.description: PR writeup — motivation, per-file changes, before/after, test plan, rollout. HTML deliverable; markdown PR description.

plan-audit-report.description: Plan verification report — verdict, requirement coverage, gaps, extras, file references, ordering issues, task-quality notes. Markdown working report; JSON PlanAuditReport data; HTML on request.

research-report.description: Research report — sourced findings, enumerated options with trade-offs, and a recommendation. Markdown working report; JSON summary data; HTML on request.

code-approaches.description: Side-by-side implementation approaches — context, per-approach pros/cons/code, recommendation.

code-understanding.description: Codebase walkthrough — components, call sequence, references answering a question.

feature-explainer.description: Feature explainer — overview, sections, code; how a feature works.

concept-explainer.description: Concept explainer — intuition, mechanics, worked example, further reading.

flowchart.description: Flowchart / pipeline diagram — nodes and directed edges. HTML CSS-spine; markdown mermaid/ASCII; JSON graph data.

slide-deck.description: Static print-friendly slide deck — title plus stacked slides. HTML deck; markdown outline; JSON slide metadata.

triage-board.description: Static kanban triage board — columns of issues. HTML board; JSON issue/column data.

feature-flags.description: Feature-flag config view — flag groups, rollout, diff. HTML viewer; JSON flag config.

design-system.description: Design-system reference — colour swatches, type scale, spacing, components. HTML reference; JSON tokens.

component-variants.description: Component variant matrix — one component across its states/props. HTML grid; JSON variant data.

visual-exploration.description: Visual design exploration — labeled direction cards. HTML mockups; markdown exploration notes.

svg-illustrations.description: Captioned inline-SVG illustrations. HTML only (purely visual — no MD/JSON sibling, D4).

prototype-animation.description: Animation/easing prototype — replayable demo + easing switcher + copy-paste CSS. Interactive template (minimal self-contained JS, AG-0011 D2). HTML only.

prototype-interaction.description: Interaction prototype — e.g. drag-to-reorder. Interactive template (minimal self-contained JS, AG-0011 D2). HTML demo; markdown behavior notes.

prompt-tuner.description: Prompt-tuning workbench — editable system prompt with live-filled preview. Interactive template (minimal self-contained JS, AG-0011 D2). HTML workbench; markdown prompt+legend; JSON prompt config.
